title: Israel strikes Beirut Dahieh — first strike since June 3 ceasefire renewal; 2 killed, 11 wounded; retaliation for Hezbollah fighter drone
snippet: IDF struck Hezbollah HQ in Dahieh (Beirut southern suburbs) in retaliation for a Hezbollah fighter drone attack earlier in the day targeting northern Israel. 2 killed, 11 wounded according to Lebanon's National News Agency. This is the first Beirut strike since the June 3 pilot zones agreement/ceasefire renewal. Netanyahu's office stated it was a direct response to the Hezbollah drone. Multiple outlets confirm: NPR, Times of Israel, Philadelphia Inquirer, Washington Times, Israel National News.
tag_reason: First Beirut/Dahieh strike since June 3 ceasefire renewal — new escalation event breaking the ceasefire
